title: CreditPlanCalculationModalityTypeValues
description:
Specifies how penalties are calculated when contractual obligations are not met.

Comment:
Examples
Late payment penalty
Overlimit penalty
Early termination penalty

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Calculation Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Specifies the method used to compute interest on the outstanding credit amount over time.

Comment:
Examples
Simple interest
Compound interest
Daily interest accrual
Reducing balance interest

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Calculation Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines how fees associated with the credit plan are calculated.

Comment:
Examples
Loan processing fee (2% of loan amount)
Late payment fee
Annual credit card fee

x-enumeration-literals.name: Repayment Installment Calculation Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines how periodic repayment installments are calculated for the credit plan.

Comment:
Examples
Equal Monthly Installment (EMI)
Balloon repayment structure
Graduated payments

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Limit Calculation Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Specifies how the maximum credit limit is determined for the customer.

Comment:
Examples
Income-based credit limit
Risk-score-based credit limit
Collateral-based credit limit

x-enumeration-literals.name: Outstanding Balance Calculation Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines how the remaining credit balance is calculated during the lifecycle of the credit plan.

Comment:
Examples
Principal + accrued interest
Principal + fees + penalties

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Accrual Calculation Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Specifies how interest accumulates over time before being charged or capitalized.

Comment:
Examples
Daily accrual
Monthly accrual
30/360 or Actual/365 day count

x-enumeration-literals.name: Early Repayment Calculation Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines how settlement amounts are calculated when the borrower repays the credit early.

Comment:
Examples
Remaining principal + penalty
Discounted settlement
